title: Fenugreek Crunch Paleo Post-Workout Snack
description: A nutty and crunchy post-workout snack featuring fenugreek, prepared through a quick pressure-cooking method to meet paleo-friendly dietary requirements.
instructions: Preheat your pressure cooker to a safe temperature for seeds and legumes.
Add fenugreek seeds, almond butter, dates, peanut butter, coconut flakes, macadamia nuts, and walnuts into the pot.
Cook on high pressure according to your pressure cooker's manual instructions until done, typically 5-10 minutes.
Once cooked, carefully release steam using the quick-release method, being cautious of hot temperatures.
Allow the mixture to cool down slightly before mixing well with a fork or immersion blender if needed for smoother consistency.
Transfer the cooled mixture into a serving dish and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Serve cold as a snack post-workout.
